requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — NM Standard Adopting IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——采用IEC 62133的NM标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——採用IEC 62133的NM標準

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs intended for the Moroccan market are assessed against the relevant Norme Marocaine (NM) standard issued by IMANOR, which adopts IEC 62133 (IEC 62133-2 for lithium systems) for safety of portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries. IMANOR operates the voluntary NM mark, and conformity to the IEC 62133-based requirement is typically demonstrated through an IEC test report (CB Scheme report is widely accepted because Morocco's national body recognises IEC-based testing). The standard covers abuse testing (overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, impact, free fall/drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and electrochemical limits. Because the NM standard mirrors IEC 62133, an internationally recognised IEC 62133-2 / CB test report from an accredited laboratory is the practical route to demonstrate cell/pack safety for Moroccan import conformity.
summary.zh: 面向摩洛哥市场的便携式锂电芯及电池组，依据IMANOR发布的相关摩洛哥标准（NM）评定，该标准采用IEC 62133（锂系统采用IEC 62133-2）用于便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池安全。IMANOR运行自愿NM标志，符合基于IEC 62133的要求通常通过IEC检测报告证明（因摩洛哥国家机构承认基于IEC的测试，CB体系报告被广泛接受）。该标准涵盖滥用测试（过充、外部短路、挤压、撞击、自由跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学限值。由于NM标准对标IEC 62133，由认可实验室出具的国际认可IEC 62133-2/CB检测报告是证明电芯/电池组安全以满足摩洛哥进口符合性的实务路径。
summary.zht: 面向摩洛哥市場的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，依據IMANOR發布的相關摩洛哥標準（NM）評定，該標準採用IEC 62133（鋰系統採用IEC 62133-2）用於便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全。IMANOR運行自願NM標誌，符合基於IEC 62133的要求通常透過IEC檢測報告證明（因摩洛哥國家機構承認基於IEC的測試，CB體系報告被廣泛接受）。該標準涵蓋濫用測試（過充、外部短路、擠壓、撞擊、自由跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學限值。由於NM標準對標IEC 62133，由認可實驗室出具的國際認可IEC 62133-2/CB檢測報告是證明電芯/電池組安全以滿足摩洛哥進口符合性的實務路徑。

standards_or_laws: NM standard adopting IEC 62133-2 — IMANOR — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries (lithium systems)
IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — base international standard adopted as the Norme Marocaine reference
IECEE CB Scheme test report — internationally recognised route accepted by IMANOR for IEC-based conformity

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), with GB 18287-2013 for mobile-phone lithium-ion batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria, and a GB 31241 report is issued against the Chinese national text rather than the IEC text. A purely domestic GB 31241 test report from a CNAS-accredited laboratory is not, by itself, an IEC 62133 / CB report and may not be directly accepted for Moroccan NM/IEC 62133 import conformity without an IEC-format report or re-testing.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），手机锂离子电池适用GB 18287-2013。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差，且GB 31241报告依据中国国家文本而非IEC文本出具。仅有CNAS认可实验室出具的国内GB 31241报告本身并非IEC 62133/CB报告，在没有IEC格式报告或重新测试的情况下，可能无法直接被摩洛哥NM/IEC 62133进口符合性接受。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），手機鋰離子電池適用GB 18287-2013。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差，且GB 31241報告依據中國國家文本而非IEC文本出具。僅有CNAS認可實驗室出具的國內GB 31241報告本身並非IEC 62133/CB報告，在沒有IEC格式報告或重新測試的情況下，可能無法直接被摩洛哥NM/IEC 62133進口符合性接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: The Moroccan baseline (NM adopting IEC 62133) is close to GB 31241 in technical content because both descend from IEC 62133-2, so the engineering gap is narrower than China-to-EU. The practical gaps are documentary rather than design: (1) Morocco expects an IEC 62133-2 or CB-Scheme report, whereas a domestic-only GB 31241 report is written against the Chinese national deviations and is not automatically an IEC report; (2) supporting documentation for the import-conformity file typically must be in French (and/or Arabic); (3) test severity differences in crush/overcharge between GB 31241 and IEC 62133-2 may require confirmation or a delta test. An exporter who already holds a CB / IEC 62133-2 report is largely positioned for the Moroccan cell-safety requirement.
gap.zh: 摩洛哥基线（采用IEC 62133的NM）在技术内容上接近GB 31241，因两者均源自IEC 62133-2，故工程差距比中国对欧盟窄。实务差距偏向文件而非设计：（1）摩洛哥期望IEC 62133-2或CB体系报告，而仅国内的GB 31241报告依据中国国家偏差出具，并非自动等同IEC报告；（2）进口符合性文件的支持材料通常须为法语（和/或阿拉伯语）；（3）GB 31241与IEC 62133-2在挤压/过充测试严苛程度上的差异可能需确认或补充差异测试。已持有CB/IEC 62133-2报告的出口商在摩洛哥电芯安全要求方面基本就绪。
gap.zht: 摩洛哥基線（採用IEC 62133的NM）在技術內容上接近GB 31241，因兩者均源自IEC 62133-2，故工程差距比中國對歐盟窄。實務差距偏向文件而非設計：（1）摩洛哥期望IEC 62133-2或CB體系報告，而僅國內的GB 31241報告依據中國國家偏差出具，並非自動等同IEC報告；（2）進口符合性文件的支持材料通常須為法語（和/或阿拉伯語）；（3）GB 31241與IEC 62133-2在擠壓/過充測試嚴苛程度上的差異可能需確認或補充差異測試。已持有CB/IEC 62133-2報告的出口商在摩洛哥電芯安全要求方面基本就緒。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in substance for import conformity — cell/pack safety to the NM standard adopting IEC 62133-2 must be demonstrated (typically via an IEC 62133-2 / CB test report) for Ministry of Industry import-conformity attestation; the NM mark itself is voluntary
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Moroccan cell/pack safety rests on the NM standard adopting IEC 62133-2, demonstrated in practice through an IEC 62133-2 or CB-Scheme test report from an accredited laboratory. Because GB 31241 and IEC 62133-2 share a common IEC ancestry, the engineering gap is small, but a domestic-only GB 31241 report is not automatically an IEC report and the import-conformity file usually requires French/Arabic supporting documentation. An exporter holding a current CB / IEC 62133-2 report is well positioned for this requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 摩洛哥电芯/电池组安全以采用IEC 62133-2的NM标准为基础，实务中通过认可实验室出具的IEC 62133-2或CB体系报告证明。由于GB 31241与IEC 62133-2同源于IEC，工程差距较小，但仅国内的GB 31241报告并非自动等同IEC报告，且进口符合性文件通常需法语/阿拉伯语支持材料。持有有效CB/IEC 62133-2报告的出口商在此要求上处于有利位置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 摩洛哥電芯/電池組安全以採用IEC 62133-2的NM標準為基礎，實務中透過認可實驗室出具的IEC 62133-2或CB體系報告證明。由於GB 31241與IEC 62133-2同源於IEC，工程差距較小，但僅國內的GB 31241報告並非自動等同IEC報告，且進口符合性文件通常需法語/阿拉伯語支持材料。持有有效CB/IEC 62133-2報告的出口商在此要求上處於有利位置。
